title: Raw Roasted Brazilian Steak Skewers
description: A light and springy Brazilian dish featuring lean minced steak, this raw-friendly recipe is perfect for a quick dinner, with a salty flavor that will leave you wanting more. It is made by dehydrating the steak to create a roasted effect without cooking.
instructions: Soak the bamboo skewers in water for 30 minutes before using.
In a large bowl, combine the minced steak, lime juice, olive oil, garlic powder, salt, black pepper, and paprika, and mix well.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours to allow the flavors to meld.
Preheat a food dehydrator to 135 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the marinated steak onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers in the food dehydrator and dehydrate for 3 hours, or until the steak reaches the desired level of dryness.
Remove the skewers from the dehydrator and serve immediately.
Garnish with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
